rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §103.053, which governs annuity compensation payments. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Annuity payments under this chapter may not be accelerated, deferred, increased, or decreased.
_note: Rule text concerns annuity compensation; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
